hero.title: The World's Most Comfortable Active Sitting Chair
hero.subtitle: Revolutionary ergonomic design that keeps you moving while you sit

features.title: Why CoreChair?
features.ergonomicDesc: Supports natural movement and proper posture
features.activeDesc: Gentle movement keeps your core engaged
features.comfortDesc: Designed for long hours at your desk

about.title: About CoreChair
about.story: Designed by a chiropractor, CoreChair revolutionizes the way we sit. Our patented technology promotes healthy movement and proper posture throughout your workday.
about.mission: Our mission is to eliminate the health risks associated with prolonged sitting while maintaining comfort and productivity.
